Interface GuiScreen

All Known Implementing Classes:
ConnectionScreen, EndGameScreen, GameScreen, LobbyScreen, MatchesScreen, NicknameScreen, ReconnectScreen, RecoveryLobbyScreen, TotemSelectionScreen
public interface GuiScreen
Contract for JavaFX screens. GuiApp only sees screens through this interface: it mounts getRoot() on the stage and forwards server messages on the JavaFX thread.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    javafx.scene.Parent
    getRoot()
     
    default boolean
    isGameScreen()
    True for the in-match screen.
    default boolean
    isPreLobbyScreen()
    True for screens shown before joining a lobby (Nickname / Matches).
    default boolean
    isRecoveryScreen()
    True for the crash-recovery waiting lobby.
    default boolean
    isTotemSelectionScreen()
    True for the pre-game totem selection screen.
    default void
    onServerMessage(ServerMessage message)
    Invoked on the JavaFX thread for every incoming server message.

  • Method Details

    • getRoot

      javafx.scene.Parent getRoot()

    • onServerMessage

      default void onServerMessage(ServerMessage message)
      Invoked on the JavaFX thread for every incoming server message.

    • isGameScreen

      default boolean isGameScreen()
      True for the in-match screen. GuiApp uses it to skip redundant navigation when a game-state message arrives and we're already there.

    • isPreLobbyScreen

      default boolean isPreLobbyScreen()
      True for screens shown before joining a lobby (Nickname / Matches). GuiApp uses it to decide whether a lobby/match-joined event should push the Lobby screen.

    • isRecoveryScreen

      default boolean isRecoveryScreen()
      True for the crash-recovery waiting lobby. GuiApp uses it to avoid rebuilding the screen on every reconnection update.

    • isTotemSelectionScreen

      default boolean isTotemSelectionScreen()
      True for the pre-game totem selection screen. GuiApp uses it to avoid rebuilding the screen on every totem-selection update.
